projectDescription: A Discord bot management platform that lets server admins control their bot, configure commands, and monitor server activity through a web dashboard — all accessed via Discord OAuth.
keyFeatures: Discord OAuth login — sign in directly with your Discord account
Per-server dashboards — each Discord server gets its own control panel
Bot controls — start, stop, restart, and configure the bot from the web
Linked account access — restrict dashboard access to specific Discord accounts
Role-based permissions — staff and admin tiers with granular access control
Command management — enable, disable, and customize bot commands
Activity logs — view bot events, moderation actions, and server activity
Auto-moderation settings — configure filters, thresholds, and responses
Welcome message customization — set channel, message template, and embed style
Real-time bot status indicator — see if the bot is online, offline, or degraded
publicApiSurface: GET /api/servers — list Discord servers the authenticated user manages
GET /api/servers/:id/dashboard — fetch dashboard data for a specific server
POST /api/servers/:id/bot/restart — restart the bot in a specific server
GET /api/servers/:id/members — list linked accounts for a server dashboard
POST /api/servers/:id/members — link a Discord account to a server dashboard
